task_completion.description: Verify that a collection named 'Web Research' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M interface, look at the left pane (collections pane) for a folder or collection named exactly 'Web Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Blog Post' was created in the collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane (Item details), the 'Item Type' field should be set to 'Blog Post', or the item in the middle pane should have the Blog Post icon.

task_completion.description: Verify the title of the blog post matches the provided metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane, the 'Title' field must contain 'Court to decide whether 'testers' have standing to sue under ADA'.

task_completion.description: Verify the author is set to Amy Howe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane, the 'Author' field must show 'Howe' for the last name and 'Amy' for the first name.

task_completion.description: Verify the Blog Title and Date match the provided metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane, the 'Blog Title' field must contain 'SCOTUSblog' and the 'Date' field must contain '2023-03-27'.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL matches the provided metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane, the 'URL' field must contain 'https://www.scotusblog.com/2023/03/court-to-decide-whether-testers-have-standing-to-sue-under-ada/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the tag 'standing' has been added to the item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane, under the 'Tags' tab, the tag 'standing' should be visible and attached to the blog post item.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application window with menus, panes, and dialogs being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the genuine Juris-M application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Juris-M (a Zotero-based reference manager), not a text editor or a mocked-up webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply paste the task description into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected metadata should be entered into the correct fields within the Juris-M application, not just written out in a generic document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Author is Amy Howe, Blog Title is SCOTUSblog, Date is 2023-03-27. Note: The task description provides a specific title and URL to use, which the agent must follow as per the instruction to use 'all provided metadata', even if the real article has a slightly different title or URL.
